title: Lesson 509: 他人, 種, 種...

items.gloss: another person; other people; others; unrelated person (i.e. not related by blood); outsider; stranger

seed (e.g. of a plant); pip; kind; variety; quality; tone; material (e.g. for an article); matter (e.g. of a story); subject; theme; (news) copy; ingredient; leaven (bread); main ingredient of a sushi; cause; source; trick; secret; magician's trick; inside story; paternal blood; lineage; breed (of a stock); sperm; semen; 10-point card (in hanafuda); tane; animal card
cause; seed; origin; variety; kind; counter for varieties
strut; short vertical post; thickness (of a book minus the cover, a sheaf of paper, etc.); handbreadth; bundle
lattice; counter for large bundles (e.g. 10 sheafs of rice, 200 sheets of calligraphy paper, 20 whistling arrows, 100 fish); handbreadth (unit for measuring the length of arrows)
